title: Cronotia Mod
description:
Explore the continent where the only trace of civilization are the ruins of a humanity punished by the forces of heaven.
Confront the beasts of evolution and be able to open the doors of the afterlife
body:
**Mainly intended to participate in a mod contest**
1. This mod is based more than anything on prehistory in its main part, the overworld, where there are 4 new biomes, the **Rain Jungle**, a tropical biome with a lot of flora and humidity. The **Firceño Forest**, an intermediate biome, mainly cold and with average humidity. The **Freezing Tundra**, cold and dry. And finally, the **Ancient Desert**, dry and warm. These biomes have ruins left by humanity millions of years ago, where you can find food, silver nuggets, and flags.
2. In all these biomes, there is the small probability of finding the **Altar of God**, where a cherub will be waiting, which upon death will release the blessed tear, necessary to create the block of **Blessed Obsidian**, the which will be used to access the **Empirical Kingdom**.

**Empirical Realm**
1. The world created by God for his devotees after the extinction of humanity. Four kings reign here, The King of Ernovinia, The King of Nordia, The King of Compo, and The Queen of Sacra. Each of them has a crown granted by God.
2. In this dimension it is impossible to navigate and the greatest resource is iron.
